title: ShadowBlade (Revamped)
description: A PvP as well as aesthetic based SMP texture pack for minecraft.
body:
## ✨ **ShadowBladeRevamped** | The Ultimate Performance & Immersion Pack
![Quality of Life (QoL)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/775615465bf5c46c24491e057dc621d10c65d071.png)

**ShadowBladeRevamped** is a comprehensive, high-quality resource pack designed to elevate every aspect of your Minecraft experience. Combining stunning visual enhancements with key quality-of-life and performance improvements, this pack is perfect for players who demand the best in **PvP**, **survival**, and **creative** gameplay.

### 🌟 Key Features:

* **Dynamic Animations:** Experience a world that truly feels alive with smooth, new animations for items, blocks, and the environment.
* **Immersive 3D Models:** Blocks and items pop off the screen with detailed **3D models**, adding depth and realism without sacrificing performance.
* **Enhanced Redstone:** Streamline your engineering with **clearer and more intuitive Redstone textures** designed to simplify complex circuit building and troubleshooting.
* **Stunning Organic Detail:** Enjoy beautiful, realistic environments thanks to detailed and realistic **3D crop models** that make farming more visually engaging.
* **PvP Optimization:** Gain an edge in combat with specific **PvP improvements**, including clearer particle effects and streamlined weapon textures.
* **Seamless Textures:** Achieve a clean, modern aesthetic with **connected glass** and **ore textures** that remove distracting borders and make your builds look sleek and unified.

### 🎯 Why Choose ShadowBladeRevamped?

This pack delivers a cohesive, visually appealing experience that respects the core Minecraft art style while introducing professional-grade enhancements. It's the perfect balance of **aesthetics, functionality, and performance**.

### For Complete Experience:
1. Use CITresewn, OptiGUI, Aniamtica, ETF, EMF and Continuity. (If possible)
2. Use Optifine.
